infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Soteria LOTO uses the camera to photograph equipment, isolation points, and nameplates for LOTO procedures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Soteria LOTO can access your photo library to select equipment photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Soteria LOTO saves equipment photos to your library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Soteria LOTO to access your camera.
Allow Soteria LOTO to use the camera for QR code scanning.
